finding_results.notes: Roughened all five cited beats. (1) Opening banter at :105 — cut the whiskey tennis ('If you can call it that'/'I can't'/'Still bad'/'Still cheap'/'That's the spirit'); kept 'Mostly judging' as one alive volley, then Hector pours without more banter and Spike sets his glass down flat. (2) 'So you lied smart' at :215 replaced with 'So you lied to her. Just not stupid' — Spike echoes Hector's own phrasing back rather than coining a new line; Hector's self-deprecating monologue replaced with evasive circular 'I told her what I told her'; Spike's neat compliment 'You always had one' replaced with silent look. (3) Archaeology line at :369 — 'It's archaeology. You buried things sloppy' replaced with direct accusation 'She didn't get this from me, Spike. She already had it. You left it where somebody could find it' — same pushback, spoken rather than aphoristic. (4) Thesis line at :431 — Hector's compressed two-sentence philosophy roughened: false start ('mouth worked'), physical fidget ('rubbed the back of his neck'), less compressed arrival ('they'd gotten real good at not calling it that' vs 'told themselves that was different'); 'knew enough' preserved for interiority echo. (5) Ship-sailed line at :601 — polished metaphor 'That ship sailed, crashed, and got salvaged for parts' replaced with flat self-assessment 'That's not really what I do'; removed added exchange ('You think she's the kid' / 'she didn't spend years learning south-basin route codes because she likes paperwork') that introduced two more quotable lines. Additionally restored snapshot interiority at :531-539 where chapter had drifted toward thesis-speech ('He wasn't going to perform a sorrow he hadn't earned' restored; 'That version had always been convenient' restored; literary tail 'the only road between a body and its slow revolt' replaced with snapshot's blunter 'the only thing holding them up'). Restored snapshot's quieter ending at :609-611 ('He could feel both of them on the walk back') over plot-forward detective momentum. Restored Hector's simpler speculation at :389 (removed medical detail about cold chains and dose-stretching that exceeded the character's knowledge). Restored snapshot's flatter interiority echo at :551 ('someone would notice if it didn't show' vs 'somebody would be counting days and cutting doses'). Result: of the five cited beats, zero now read as standalone quotable lines. Multiple exchanges feature evasion, flat functional responses, physical fidgeting, and imperfect arrivals at meaning.

summary: Single finding addressed: roughened all five cited dialogue beats in the Spike-Hector bar scene to break one-liner tennis and reduce quotable polish. Opening banter cut from six consecutive clean volleys to two exchanges plus silence. Three subsequent beats ('lied smart', archaeology, thesis line) revised from composed aphorisms to messier spoken arrivals with false starts, evasive circularity, and physical fidgets. Closing beat ('ship sailed') replaced with flat self-assessment and snapshot's quieter exit restored. Interiority section restored from snapshot where chapter had drifted toward thesis-speech. Hector's speculative medical detail removed as exceeding character knowledge. No continuity, heading, or style-bible violations introduced.
